description: Karaite inheritance document. Dated Sunday, 15 Tevet 5496 AM (1735 CE). Location: presumably Cairo, in the house of Eliyahu the physician b. Elisha Rofe, in the presence of Yehuda b. Shemuel Rofe, Aharon Kohen known as Shami and Shemuel Levi Gabi b. Elya Levi and in the presence of the 'kahal'. The document details a transfer of 23 gold cinzirli and 35 medin from the inheritance of the deceased Moshe Rofe. Signed by the scribe Yeshu'a (surname omitted), Avraham Fayruz, Shelomo Levi known as Karsi, Eliyahu b. Elisha the physician, Ishaq Levi known as Qays, Sa'adya Halevi known as Qayīm, Aharon Kohen known as Shami.
description_he: מסמך ירושה קראי. תאריך: א', ט"ו טבת 5496 = 1735 לספירה. מיקום: כנראה קהיר, בית אליהו הרופא ב' אלישע רופא. מפרט העברה של 23 צ'ינזירלי זהב ו-35 מדין מירושת משה רופא המנוח. חתמו: ישועה הסופר, אברהם פירוז, שלמה לוי הידוע כקרסי, ועוד.
